allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const { Pool } = require\('pg'\); const pool = new Pool\({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL }\); pool.query\('SELECT id, username, role, is_active, password_changed FROM users'\).then\(r => { console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows, null, 2\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('DB ERROR:', e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")
Bash(psql -U postgres -c "GRANT ALL ON SCHEMA public TO fernando; GRANT ALL ON DATABASE attendance_db TO fernando;" attendance_db)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed PID $_" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | Where-Object { $_ -ne 0 } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed PID $_" })
Bash(psql -U postgres -d "attendance_db" -c "GRANT CREATE ON SCHEMA public TO fernando; GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA public TO fernando;")
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\17\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -d attendance_db -c "GRANT CREATE ON SCHEMA public TO fernando; GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA public TO fernando;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($procs = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.OwningProcess -gt 4 } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($p in $procs\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Killed $p" })

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "admin"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\17\\bin\\psql.exe" -U fernando -d attendance_db -h localhost -c "DELETE FROM attendance_raw WHERE zk_transaction_id = 1;" -c "DELETE FROM attendance_daily WHERE employee_id = \(SELECT id FROM employees WHERE zk_employee_id = '1'\) AND date = '2026-05-11';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Xerox@2026' "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -U fernando -d attendance_db -h localhost -c "SELECT e.full_name, s.name AS shift_name, s.std_hours_per_day FROM employees e LEFT JOIN shifts s ON s.id = e.shift_id WHERE e.is_active = true;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Xerox@2026' "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -U fernando -d attendance_db -h localhost -c "SELECT e.name, s.name AS shift_name, s.std_hours_per_day FROM employees e LEFT JOIN shifts s ON s.id = e.shift_id WHERE e.is_active = true;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Xerox@2026' "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -U fernando -d attendance_db -h localhost -c "DELETE FROM attendance_daily WHERE date < '2026-05-01'; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS remaining FROM attendance_daily;")
Bash(psql -h localhost -U fernando -d attendance_db -c "SELECT id FROM employees WHERE employee_code='EMP-0003';")
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.OwningProcess -in \(20924,20812,11588,13360,22768\) } | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 22768 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id 20812 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 3000 })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 3000 }; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'node.exe'" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine)
